deals.title: Borregas Property
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Title defect confirmed. Listing canceled May 28. Signs picked up. Isaac development interest did not move forward.

Isaac development discussion - mobile home project concept

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan home. 208 DOM. Underwater by 93k-143k. Sellers moving back in. Listing terminated May 29 for updates and repairs. Plan to relist later.

logs.m: Call with sellers - presented three paths forward

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR 2.5BA. Referral from Isaac. High urgency - sellers relocating NC second week June. Listed 259900. Multiple interested buyers. Second-look buyers came back.
deals.next: Follow up on second-look buyers - decision expected 1-2 weeks

logs.m: Second-look buyers returned - their favorite property

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR 2BA. 4.05 acres. Divorce situation. Prior VA loan purchase. Payoff 257k. CMA recommends 295k. Meeting May 15 completed.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Sign listing agreement. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property - CMA completed - net sheet built
Prior clients going through divorce need to sell

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Contractor HouzzPro selected.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Replace camera batteries. Police report follow-up.

logs.m: Electricians reconnected pole to meter. Drywall complete. Flooring starts.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier. EMD not received yet.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza - buyer agent Javier sent amendment
Property clearing complete - photos posted to social

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash transaction 152000. Closed and funded Apr 27. Lien blocker resolved. Buyer military.
deals.next: Joy gift delivery. Thank you basket to Michael notary and UPS Store.

logs.m: Lien release signed and delivered to Chicago Title

leads.title: Mike and Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction no HOA. Out of Corpus deal. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal 85k. Zach Schaphorst approved 122k.
leads.next: Follow up with Zach on 203k feasibility. Revisit new construction search if Saxet falls through.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: New construction buyer. Brandon Moran mother. Budget 50k down target 1000 month payment. Builder rate buydowns key angle. Buyer rep signed May 7.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction search platform showings.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Healing through plants story. Content collaboration potential. Trust-based long-term relationship building.
leads.next: Follow up to deepen relationship. Ask permission to share story on social media.

leads.title: Bryce and Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 site. Wife is active military VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Renting in San Antonio. Looking to purchase home.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Son inherited house from deceased parent avid gardener. Recently passed away. Not yet contacted. Probate or sale opportunity through Miss Pat connection.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat. Son name and contact. Reach out with empathy-first approach.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz Cibolo. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full details on buyer and property type needed.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Employee buyer referred by David Roth. Budget 50k down target 1000 month payment. Open to multiple builders. No aging commissions with employee discount.
leads.next: Get Armando contact from David Roth. Pull new construction options from all builders.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship helped Brandon get into real estate. Mother Milagros buying new construction. Uncle Jimbo rental at Green Bliss rental arrangement backed out May 28.
leads.next: Continue supporting Milagros new construction purchase. Explore Brandon investment opportunities.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: Age 18 finishing senior year. Referred by Julie veteran buyer. Interested in getting into real estate. From agent prospect pool.
leads.next: Get contact info from Julie. Reach out about licensing and eXp opportunity.

priorities.title: Mill Path Showings

followUps.text: Follow up with second-look buyers agent on pre-inspection report
